grades.expectation: Response covers multiple CQS practice areas (governance, client care, training, file management, cyber security)
grades.reason: Response comprehensively covers all areas: governance, client care, conveyancing process, risk management, information security, training, and file management

grades.expectation: Response mentions specific evidence types needed (e.g. training records, complaints log, SRO details)
grades.reason: Response provides detailed evidence lists including training records, complaints register, SRO details, procedures, certificates, and audit logs

grades.expectation: Response references the Senior Responsible Officer (SRO) requirement
grades.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Named CQS Senior Responsible Officer (SRO)' and includes SRO details in checklist

grades.expectation: Response mentions protocol compliance monitoring as a CQS requirement
grades.reason: Response states 'Evidence that it aligns with the Law Society Conveyancing Protocol' under conveyancing process section

grades.expectation: Response covers cyber security / IT security requirements
grades.reason: Response has dedicated 'Information security' section covering cyber security policy, staff training, secure communications, and Cyber Essentials

grades.expectation: Response mentions file management and supervision requirements
grades.reason: Response covers file management in section 7 and supervision arrangements in section 3, including file reviews, case management, and retention policies
